name: Baked Macaroni and Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups lowfat cheddar cheese, shredded, divided
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Melt the margarine in a skillet over medium heat. Add onions and garlic and sauté until tender.
3. Stir in flour and cook for about 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
4. Gradually add milk, whisking after each addition, until the mixture bubbles slightly.
5. Bring to a boil, then stir in salt, white pepper, cayenne pepper (if using), and one cup of cheddar cheese.
6. Cook, stirring constantly for 2 to 3 more minutes.
7. Grease a 1.5-quart baking dish with cooking spray.
8. Place cooked macaroni into the dish. Pour the cheese sauce over the macaroni and mix gently.
9. Sprinkle the remaining cheddar cheese (1/2 cup) over the top.
10. Spread breadcrumbs evenly over the cheese layer.
11. Bake, uncovered, for 30 minutes or until the top is golden brown and the sauce is bubbling.
Per serving: 375 calories (28% from fat)
